name: Vegetarian Spaghetti Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-stick saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add the finely chopped carrots and onion; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes. If the pan gets too dry, add up to two tablespoons of water.
2. Stir in minced garlic for an additional 30 seconds.
3. Add the drained and rinsed kidney beans, cannellini beans, basil, oregano, tomatoes (broken into pieces), tomato paste, and mushrooms. Stir to combine.
4. Cover the pan and simmer on low heat for about 25 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
5. Stir in the broccoli and cook until tender, approximately 5 more minutes.
6. Season with pepper to taste.
Per Serving: Approximately ¾ cup contains 190 calories, 11 grams of protein, 3 grams of fat, 35 grams of carbohydrates, and no cholesterol or sodium.
